caption: The video depicts a group of four individuals, likely medical students or healthcare professionals, seated around a table in a classroom or meeting room setting. They are all wearing masks and appear to be engaged in a collaborative activity, possibly related to a simulation week exercise as indicated by the "Sim Week" logo in the bottom right corner. Each person has papers and pens in front of them, suggesting they are taking notes or working on a task together. The room is equipped with multiple monitors displaying different content, which might be used for presentations or reference materials. The participants seem focused and attentive, occasionally interacting with each other, indicating a structured and educational environment. The "Day 1" label in the bottom left corner suggests this is the beginning of a multi-day event or training session.
